document_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout A. SMART Goals at Home Letter

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout A. SMART Goals at Home Letter::000
chunks.text: Dear Parents and Caregivers, This week, your child is learning about SMART goals in their financial literacy lesson! A SMART goal is a goal that is Specific, Measurable, Achievable, Relevant, and Time-bound—a framework that helps students turn their dreams into actionable steps. To reinforce this learning, your child is bringing home the 4-5FL.2 SMART Goal Progress Tracker (Handout C) to share their goal with you. Your support in this process will help them stay motivated and accountable. How You Can Support at Home:

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout A. SMART Goals at Home Letter::001
chunks.text: to them, and how they plan to achieve it.
heading_path: ✅Review their SMART Goal Progress Tracker – Ask your child to explain their goal, why it matters

chunks.chunk_id: 4-5.FL.2 Handout A. SMART Goals at Home Letter::002
chunks.text: • What small steps will you take this week? What challenges might you face, and how can we work through them? How will you track your progress?

✅Ask reflective questions – Help your child think through their plan by asking questions like:
